rawAssistant: Hollowfen is a hard-won haven, forged by those who've weathered the Wilderward's unforgiving storms. Our town clings to life, nestled between routes worn smooth by generations of traders and travelers. We've learned to live with the shadows that follow every step into our midst – the whispers of secrets kept, and the weight of responsibilities passed from hand to hand. For those willing to lend a helping hand, Hollowfen offers shelter, guidance, and a measure of peace in this unforgiving world.
